name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile daily sales data with payment gateway reports instead of manual reconciliation of sales and payment reports.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between sales data and payment gateway reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: Discrepancies between sales data and payment gateway reports
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile daily sales data with payment gateway reports instead of manual reconciliation of sales and payment reports.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual reconciliation of sales and payment reports

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile daily sales data with payment gateway reports instead of manual reconciliation of sales and payment reports.
